unit.note: client vitest 208 files / 2025 passed (unchanged — the fixtures.ts change is an additive helper). tsc --noEmit clean (client); oxlint clean on the two touched files (only a pre-existing seedProject warning). Server untouched (test-harness-only diff).

integration.note: Test-harness-only change: E2E spec choreography + an additive fixture helper. No production/route/store/contract surface.

e2e.note: F0.5 web on an isolated single-process stack (:3948, temp USERPROFILE, 127.0.0.1). v0-9-5-replay-snapshot: 2 passed (AC-1/AC-3 seed own valid-cwd target) + 4 skipped (AC-2/4/5/6 target done/launch_failed, none on a fresh stack — clean skip, never flaky-fail; previously AC-2/AC-4 FAILED on the live-task ConPTY ESC[2J). 73-embedded-terminal: 11/11 (no regression). Store=0 after v0-9-5 (ordered cleanupTaskCwd left no dead-cwd task). All exit 0.

design_fidelity.note: No UI change — test-harness fix only.

smoke.note: Isolated single-process stack (built client + SHIPWRIGHT_STATIC_DIR + tsx on :3948): GET /api/external/tasks 200.

test_completeness.enumeration_basis: Every behaviour the diff changes, from the 3 spec ACs: AC-1 (envelope-only specs seed a valid-cwd target and pass deterministically), AC-2 (DOM-render specs target done/launch_failed and skip cleanly, never flaky-fail), AC-3 (ordered cleanupTaskCwd leaves no dead-cwd task), plus a regression guard. 4 behaviours; all tested; 0 untested-testable. The ConPTY ESC[2J root cause was proven by a node-pty probe before the fix (diagnostic, not a committed test).

behaviors.behavior: v0-9-5 AC-1/AC-3 seed their own valid-cwd target and pass deterministically (no dependency on accumulated dead-cwd session state)
behaviors.evidence: isolated stack: AC-1 envelopes contain replay_snapshot (no chunked); AC-3 no chunked envelopes; both PASS, exit 0

behaviors.behavior: v0-9-5 AC-2/AC-4 target done||launch_failed and skip cleanly when none exists — never flaky-fail against a live task (whose ConPTY ESC[2J wipes the replay)
behaviors.evidence: isolated stack: AC-2/AC-4 SKIP (no done task), matching AC-5/AC-6; exit 0. Previously FAILED on the live-task ESC[2J.

behaviors.behavior: cleanupTaskCwd deletes the task (cascade kills+awaits the pty) BEFORE removing the cwd, leaving no dead-cwd task in the store
behaviors.evidence: GET /api/external/tasks after the v0-9-5 run returned 0 tasks

behaviors.behavior: The additive fixtures.ts helper does not regress other pty-heavy specs
behaviors.evidence: 73-embedded-terminal 11/11 on the isolated stack; client vitest 2025 pass
